creator: exploringlondon
caption:
This is where you can find London’s only -86°C iced dirty coffee! 🧊☕️ Pick your flavour (the ube and matcha lattes were INCREDIBLE 🔥) and don’t forget their delicious bakes and patisserie!

📍 @onsubakery

transcription.text: Did you know that right by Chinatown, you can find something you won't find anywhere else in London? This is Onsu Bakery, an incredible Asian bakery and patisserie. And they are serving London's only minus 86 degree dirty coffees. They pull these ice cold cups out of the minus 86 degree freezer and make some incredible drinks in them. This is the dirty coffee and we also got an ube latte and a matcha latte. Guys, these are viral for a reason because they actually taste really good as well. They're £5.20 a cup. There's lots of seating in the cafe as well, so definitely check this one out.
